# SponsorJuice
> Free creator rate calculator for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook brand deals. Estimates sponsorship pricing from average views, niche, audience geography, and deliverable packages. Includes pitch templates and local calculation history.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://sponsorjuice.com/): Main calculator and overview
- [TikTok Calculator](https://sponsorjuice.com/calculator/tiktok/): TikTok brand deal rate estimator
- [Instagram Calculator](https://sponsorjuice.com/calculator/instagram/): Instagram sponsorship rate estimator
- [YouTube Calculator](https://sponsorjuice.com/calculator/youtube/): YouTube sponsorship rate estimator
- [Facebook Calculator](https://sponsorjuice.com/calculator/facebook/): Facebook sponsorship rate estimator
- [Creator Guides](https://sponsorjuice.com/blog/): Pricing and outreach articles
- [About](https://sponsorjuice.com/about/): Mission and methodology
- [Contact](https://sponsorjuice.com/contact/): Support and inquiries
- [Privacy Policy](https://sponsorjuice.com/privacy/): Data and advertising practices

## Key facts
- SponsorJuice is 100% free with no account required
- Calculations run client-side in the browser; saved history uses local storage only
- Rate formula: average views × platform coefficient × niche multiplier × geography weight
- Platform coefficients (per view): TikTok $0.005–$0.012, Instagram $0.007–$0.015, YouTube $0.015–$0.035, Facebook $0.005–$0.013
- Contact: amitjaiswar1502@gmail.com
